feat.name: Master Skysage Divination
feat.text: You unlock the most powerful secrets hidden in the stars above. You choose one of the following 7th-rank spells to add to your spell repertoire: *retrocognition* or *true target*. At 18th level, add *pinpoint* to your spell repertoire, and at 20th level, add *foresight* to your spell repertoire. You gain master proficiency with spell attack rolls and spell DCs for occult spells.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
